title: Garlicky Chewy Brazilian Rice Bake
description: A comforting Brazilian rice bake that is both flavorful and filling. Perfect for a sick day, this dish combines the richness of Parmigiano-Reggiano with the bold flavors of Brazil.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the garlic and onion and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Stir in the cumin, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the flour to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and cook until melted and smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, beaten egg, and beef mixture. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the rice mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Drizzle the red wine over the top of the rice mixture and flambe until the wine is caramelized and the rice is lightly browned.
Bake the rice bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and the rice is heated through.
